Uses of Class
com.github.hazendaz.beanprovider.internal.deltaspike.metadata.builder.AnnotatedTypeBuilder

Packages that use AnnotatedTypeBuilder
Package
Description
com.github.hazendaz.beanprovider.internal.deltaspike.metadata.builder
Provides restored DeltaSpike 2.0 classes, such as AnnotatedTypeBuilder, to enable advanced CDI type and annotation manipulation.

  • Uses of AnnotatedTypeBuilder in com.github.hazendaz.beanprovider.internal.deltaspike.metadata.builder

    Description

    Add an annotation to the type declaration.

    Add an annotation to the specified constructor.
